20366.title: Tinissima quartet - Banlieues Bleues
20366.description: Francesco Bearzatti Tinissima 4et 'This machine kills fascists' Italian saxophonist Francesco Bearzatti en his Tinissima Quartet pay tribute to Woody Guthrie, the father van modern folk music, during the 'This Machine Kills Fascists' concert.
